mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id} AND stock >= #{quantity}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_log (product_id, change_amount, before_stock, after_stock) VALUES (#{productId}, #{changeAmount}, #{beforeStock}, #{afterStock})
mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_review (review_no, user_id, product_id, order_no, rating, content, pics) VALUES (#{reviewNo}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderNo}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{pics})
mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET review_count = review_count + 1, avg_rating = (avg_rating * review_count + #{rating}) / (review_count + 1) WHERE id = #{productId};
mapper.select: SELECT review_no, user_id, rating, content, pics, create_time FROM product_review WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY #{sort} DESC
SELECT count(1) FROM product_review WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM product_review WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE goods SET review_count = review_count - 1, avg_rating = CASE WHEN review_count - 1 = 0 THEN 0.0 ELSE(avg_rating * review_count - #{deletedRating}/(review_count - 1)) END WHERE id = #{productId}
